import bisect


class SortedScoreboard:
    def __init__(self):
        self.scores: list[int] = []

    def add_score(self, score: int) -> None:
        bisect.insort(self.scores, score)

    def get_rankings(self) -> list[int]:
        return self.scores


class PriorityQueue:
    def __init__(self):
        self.items: list[tuple[int, str]] = []

    def push(self, priority: int, item: str) -> None:
        bisect.insort(self.items, (priority, item), key=lambda x: x[0])

    def pop(self) -> str:
        return self.items.pop(0)[1]


class SortedTimestamps:
    def __init__(self):
        self.timestamps: list[float] = []

    def record(self, ts: float) -> None:
        bisect.insort(self.timestamps, ts)

    def get_latest(self) -> float:
        return self.timestamps[-1]
